prestazioni: Nettuno V6 (F160) engine: Full titanium 3D-printed intake manifold by Novitec with integrated methanol-water injection (AEM 3400cc/min kit) to suppress detonation at 1.8 bar boost on the stock IHI turbochargers, paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU reflash for 800+ HP on E85 fuel

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed rebound) and Maserati-specific spring rates (12kg/mm front, 14kg/mm rear) for track use, paired with spherical bearing front upper control arms from Maserati Corse

Brembo GT 380x38mm 6-piston monobloc calipers with carbon-ceramic rotors (410mm front, 390mm rear) and Ferodo DS3.12 racing pads, paired with Goodridge 900-series braided stainless steel brake lines and Castrol SRF brake fluid
estetica: Novitec MC20-specific carbon fiber widebody kit with integrated active aero (adjustable rear wing and front splitter) and 3D-printed air curtains for optimized airflow to the Nettuno V6 intercoolers
Rocket Bunny MC20 Cielo convertible-specific carbon fiber hardtop with integrated roll hoop and rear diffuser, finished in matte Grigio Touring with exposed carbon weave accents

Custom 20-inch front / 21-inch rear forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF03 model) with titanium hardware, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear) and painted in Grigio Titanio with polished lip
